texto: The aim of science is to make difficult things understandable in a simpler way
autor: the aim of poetry is to state simple things in an incomprehensible way. The two are incompatible.
explicacao: Citação de the aim of poetry is to state simple things in an incomprehensible way. The two are incompatible. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The aim of science is to make difficult things understandable in a simpler way” articula reflexao, paul-a-m-dirac, science em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
